[PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27330193/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md)
## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

What VelocityX area does this affect?

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] UI polish
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test or build change
- [ ] Security or privacy hardening
- [ ] Other

## Verification

- [ ] I loaded VelocityX as an unpacked extension.
- [ ] I manually verified the affected popup, options, overlay, or DevTools behavior.
- [ ] I checked affected media playback behavior.
- [ ] I updated docs or screenshots when public behavior changed.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, private data, or unrelated files are included.

## Privacy And Permissions

- [ ] No new browser permissions are added.
- [ ] No new user data is collected without a clear reason.
- [ ] No remote scripts, tracking, telemetry, or unexplained network calls are added.

## Risk

- [ ] Low risk or documentation-only change.
- [ ] Behavior, permissions, storage, security, or release impact needs reviewer attention.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out anything that needs extra attention, follow-up work, or product direction review.
